dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7141 IH: Affordable Housing Guarantee Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Miller-Meeks introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to modify the maximum guaranty amount of certain home loans guaranteed by the Department of Veterans Affairs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Affordable Housing Guarantee Act.

section.header: Maximum guaranty amount of certain home loans guaranteed by the Department of Veterans Affairs
section.text: Section 3703(a)(1)(A)(i)(IV) of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking title, 25 percent of the loan; or and inserting title—; and
by adding at the end the following new items:

item.text: in the case of a veteran with a service-connected disability whose entitlement under this chapter is unused or has been restored in full, 50 percent of the loan; and
in the case of a veteran other than a veteran described in item (aa), 25 percent of the loan; or
